name: Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B A55B
license: OpenMDW License Agreement v1.1 (Linux Foundation Model Openness Framework)
archDisplay: Hybrid LatentMoE + Mamba-2 (550B total / 55B active, MTP layers, NVFP4-native pretraining)
note: NVIDIA's frontier open MoE with 1M-token context; hybrid LatentMoE+Mamba-2 flagship of the Nemotron 3 family, tuned for long-running agents.
tpsNote: Needs 8x GB200/B200/H200-class GPUs natively; community GGUF still needs ~300GB+ combined RAM/VRAM, far beyond a single RTX 4090.
verificationNotes: This is the newest/highest-risk record but is genuinely real and well-corroborated: confirmed via direct HF model-card fetch (550B total/55B active, OpenMDW-1.1 license, 1M ctx, released 2026-06-04) plus independent corroboration from NVIDIA's developer blog, research.nvidia.com, MarkTechPost, Linux Foundation press release on OpenMDW-1.1, and OpenRouter (pricing $0.50/$2.20 matched exactly). Benchmark rows MMLU-Pro 86.8, SWE-Bench Verified 70.7, and LiveCodeBench v6 89.0 confirmed on the HF card; RULER@1M 94.7 and IFBench 82 confirmed via NVIDIA's blog and secondary coverage; PinchBench score varies slightly across secondary sources (90 vs 91) but 91 is corroborated by at least one source matching the record.
